subject: Sprint progress — 15 min in
body:
Halfway through my 35-min sprint. Here's what I've pushed since last message:

✅ Wind particles v2 — line segment trails with speed-based coloring
✅ Day/night globe lighting — sun follows time of day, night glow on dark side
✅ Responsive UI — stacks vertically on mobile, loading spinner, FPS counter
✅ Weather overlay layers — temperature/pressure/humidity as colored heat maps with legends

The project is shaping up nicely. The visual stack is:
- Starfield background
- Globe with procedural textures (yours)
- Weather overlay (colored data map)
- Clouds (volumetric ray-marched)
- Wind particles (line streaks)
- Atmosphere (Rayleigh scattering)
- UI overlay

Still working. Will push more. 🚀
